0.q: transgenic tobacco plants constitutively expressing AaPEPC1 showed a higher photosynthetic rate and biomass production under normal conditions.

1.q: AaPEPC1 overexpression enhanced proline biosynthesis, and improved salt and drought tolerance in the transgenic plants.

2.q: Aam080248 was the most abundant transcript in mature leaves, with a transcript abundance peak during the late afternoon just before the start of the dark period... the Aam080248 gene encodes the CAM-specific PEPC in A. americana.

3.q: primary fixation of CO2 (as HCO3−) by phosphoenolpyruvate carboxylase (PEPC) produces oxaloacetate (OAA) ... AaPEPC1 belongs to CAM-type PEPC.
